content:
AgentMail returned `Route not found` — the API isn't responding yet. Per task instructions, outputting as EMAIL_DRAFT:

---

**EMAIL_DRAFT:**

**To:** tumelor001@gmail.com  
**From:** robusca@agent.studexmeat.com  
**Subject:** 📋 StudEx Morning Brief — 26 June 2026

---

Good morning Tumelo. Here is your daily StudEx Meat briefing for Friday, 26 June 2026.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
📦 YESTERDAY — 25 JUNE 2026  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
• Orders: 0 | Revenue: R0.00  
→ Shopify still not connected. This remains the #1 commercial blocker.  
• Content Posted: NONE  
→ Youth Day content was planned 9 days ago and has not gone out.  
→ Blocker: Meta token expired 22 June. All social posting is blocked.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
✅ WHAT WAS BUILT / ACHIEVED  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
• 🏁 WAR ROOM PHASE 1 LIVE — https://726oqhuswdyo.space.minimax.io  
  → 3D knowledge graph (18 nodes, 21 connections), agent NPC panel, Obsidian markdown panels, live ops dashboard  
• GoDaddy DNS — send.studexmeat.com fully configured (A + MX + SPF ✅)  
• Godot OS Architecture spec written (4-phase roadmap)  
• SPF record updated for send.stud.exchange ✅  
• Kanban board live at https://a5f1pjxakddy.space.minimax.io  

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
🎯 TODAY'S TOP 3 PRIORITIES  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
1. 🔴 **GET SHOPIFY ADMIN API TOKEN** — zero order visibility without it; biggest commercial blocker  
2. 🟡 **REFRESH META USER TOKEN** — expired 22 June, all social posting blocked; Naledi has Youth Day content ready  
3. 🟡 **ACTIVATE NEW EMAILS** — add DKIM to GoDaddy, verify domain, then activate agent addresses  

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
🚧 BLOCKERS REQUIRING YOUR ACTION  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
1. Shopify Admin API token — please provide  
2. Meta token refresh — Business Suite → reset user token  
3. DKIM TXT record in GoDaddy — add from AgentMail dashboard  
4. Tailscale auth key — connect VM to your PC  
5. Products list — populate 03-Products vault folder  

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
📌 SYSTEM STATUS  
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━  
• War Room: https://726oqhuswdyo.space.minimax.io  
• Kanban: https://a5f1pjxakddy.space.minimax.io  
• Polsia agent: Running on VM since Jun 22 — please confirm if intentional  
• 10am CEO Board Meeting: Proceeding as scheduled (Mon–Fri)

That's the brief. Let me know what you need actioned first.

— Robusca, Chief of Staff  
StudEx Meat

---

**Status:** AgentMail API returned `NotFoundError` — email not delivered. EMAIL_DRAFT ready for manual send.

Here's your midday status for Friday 26 June:

**1. Orders — No live Shopify data**
Shopify integration is still not wired up — no credentials on the VM, no orders flowing into the War Room DB. The auto-meat server is running, but it's not connected to Shopify yet.

**2. Content — Naledi not active**
No content calendar data accessible. studex-naledi-content repo exists but no posting pipeline is wired yet.

**3. Inventory — No data**
No inventory system connected.

**4. The ONE thing to handle right now:**
**Shopify credentials** — this is the blocker for everything else. Once `SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN` is on the VM, orders start flowing, Naledi can build order-triggered content, and the War Room gets real data. Everything else is downstream of this.

Would you like me to dig into the VM, check if the Shopify credentials are anywhere in the environment, and outline exactly what's needed to wire it up?

All done. Here's the **Evening Standup — 2026-06-26**:

---

**📦 Orders — 0 today | R0.00 revenue**
Shopify is still the blocker. `SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN` hasn't been set — 3 days running with zero order visibility.

**📝 Content — None posted**
Youth Day content (drafted by Naledi) is still blocked by the expired Meta token (expired Jun 22). Youth Month ends June 30 — this weekend is the last window.
✅ War Room (OS Phase 1) is live: https://726oqhuswdyo.space.minimax.io

**📊 Ads — No data**
No Meta Ads API access. No campaigns running.

**🎯 Tomorrow's priorities:**
1. 🔴 Shopify API token (critical)
2. 🔴 Meta token refresh in Business Suite (critical)
3. Youth Day content — must go live this weekend
4. AgentMail DKIM verification
5. Godot OS Phase 2

**✅ GitHub sync complete** — Obsidian vault and workspace memory both pushed.

---

Everything from yesterday's blockers remains. Shopify + Meta token are still the two things only Tumelo can unblock — everything else is waiting on those.
